reviews.author: Brian
reviews.text: Justin,, and Matt with coastal Carolina synthetic turf recently did my entire backyard here at Sunset Beach, I never had turf in previous homes, once they installed it, I realized what I have been missing all these years, it is an absolute amazing product that they installed, I’m extremely happy with the turnout and the zero maintenance and year-round green, my dog Eddie absolutely loves it as well. Extremely professional great guys to work with would highly recommend them.
